mapper.insert:
SELECT PROJECTS_SEQ .NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO project (projectId, projectType, pmoType, title, description, startDate, endDate, createdDate, status, progress) VALUES(#{projectId}, #{projectType}, #{pmoType}, #{title}, #{description}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, SYSDATE, CASE WHEN #{endDate} < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 4 WHEN #{startDate} <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND #{endDate} >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT stageId AS stageId, sequence AS sequence FROM STAGE WHERE projectId = #{projectId} ORDER BY sequence
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TASK ( TASKID, STAGEID, TASKTITLE, TASKDESCRIPTION, TASKCREATOR, TASKSTATUS, TASKCREATEDDATE ) SELECT 'TSK' || LPAD(TASK_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 8, '0'), #{stageId}, jt.taskTitle, '', #{creator}, '1', SYSDATE FROM JSON_TABLE( #{tasks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '$[*]' COLUMNS ( taskTitle VARCHAR2(200) PATH '$.taskTitle' ) ) jt
mapper.select:
SELECT p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.PROJECTTYPE, CASE WHEN COUNT(e.NAME) > 1 THEN MIN(e.NAME) || ' 외 ' || (COUNT(e.NAME) - 1) || '명' ELSE MIN(e.NAME) END AS managerName, TO_CHAR(p.STARTDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(p.ENDDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS endDate, TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - p.STARTDATE) AS totalDays, CASE WHEN p.STARTDATE > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '시작 전' WHEN p.ENDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '종료' ELSE TO_CHAR(GREATEST(TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - SYSDATE), 0)) || ' / ' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - p.STARTDATE)) END AS remainDays, p.PROGRESS, CASE WHEN p.ENDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '4' WHEN p.STARTDATE <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND p.ENDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '2' ELSE p.STATUS END AS status FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.PROJECTID = ep.PROJECTID JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e ON ep.EMPID = e.EMPID WHERE ep.ROLE = 'M'
AND
GROUP BY p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.PROJECTTYPE, p.STARTDATE, p.ENDDATE, p.PROGRESS, p.STATUS ORDER BY p.PROJECTID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.PROJECTID = ep.PROJECTID JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e ON ep.EMPID = e.EMPID WHERE ep.ROLE = 'M'
AND

SELECT p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.PROJECTTYPE, p.PMOTYPE, p.DESCRIPTION, TO_CHAR(p.STARTDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(p.ENDDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS endDate, TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - p.STARTDATE) AS totalDays, CASE WHEN p.STARTDATE > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '시작 전' WHEN p.ENDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '0' ELSE TO_CHAR(GREATEST(TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - SYSDATE), 0)) || ' / ' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - p.STARTDATE)) END AS remainDays, p.PROGRESS, p.STATUS, LISTAGG(e.NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e.NAME) AS managerName FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.PROJECTID = ep.PROJECTID JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e ON ep.EMPID = e.EMPID WHERE p.PROJECTID = #{projectId} AND ep.ROLE = 'M' GROUP BY p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.PROJECTTYPE, p.PMOTYPE, p.DESCRIPTION, p.STARTDATE, p.ENDDATE, p.PROGRESS, p.STATUS
SELECT ep.EMPID AS empId, e.NAME AS name, ep.ROLE AS role FROM EMPPROJECT ep JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e ON ep.EMPID = e.EMPID WHERE ep.PROJECTID = #{projectId}

SELECT p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.DESCRIPTION, TO_CHAR(p.STARTDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(p.ENDDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS endDate, p.PROGRESS, LISTAGG(e.NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e.NAME) AS managerName FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.PROJECTID = ep.PROJECTID JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e ON ep.EMPID = e.EMPID WHERE p.PROJECTID = #{projectId} AND ep.ROLE = 'M' GROUP BY p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.DESCRIPTION, p.STARTDATE, p.ENDDATE, p.PROGRESS
SELECT p.* FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.projectId = ep.projectId WHERE ep.empId = #{empId}

SELECT p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.PROJECTTYPE, CASE WHEN COUNT(e_m.NAME) > 1 THEN MIN(e_m.NAME) || ' 외 ' || (COUNT(e_m.NAME) - 1) || '명' ELSE MIN(e_m.NAME) END AS managerName, TO_CHAR(p.STARTDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(p.ENDDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS endDate, TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - p.STARTDATE) AS totalDays, CASE WHEN p.STARTDATE > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '시작 전' WHEN p.ENDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '0' ELSE TO_CHAR(GREATEST(TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - SYSDATE), 0)) || ' / ' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - p.STARTDATE)) END AS remainDays, p.PROGRESS, CASE WHEN p.ENDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '4' WHEN p.STARTDATE <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND p.ENDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '2' ELSE p.STATUS END AS status FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep_user ON p.PROJECTID = ep_user.PROJECTID AND ep_user.EMPID = #{empId} JOIN EMPPROJECT ep_m ON p.PROJECTID = ep_m.PROJECTID AND ep_m.ROLE = 'M' JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e_m ON ep_m.EMPID = e_m.EMPID GROUP BY p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.PROJECTTYPE, p.STARTDATE, p.ENDDATE, p.PROGRESS, p.STATUS ORDER BY p.PROJECTID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.PROJECTID = ep.PROJECTID WHERE ep.EMPID = #{empId}
